assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const fields = $('Pegar informação do contato').item.json.data?.card?.fields || []; const get = (id) => fields.find(x => (x.field?.id || x.indexName || '') === id); const out = []; const push = (v) => { if (v == null) return; if (Array.isArray(v)) return v.forEach(push); if (typeof v === 'object') { if (v.id != null) out.push(String(v.id)); return; } if (typeof v === 'number') return out.push(String(v)); if (typeof v === 'string') return out.push(v.trim()); }; const f = get('ultimas_empresas'); if (f) { push(f.array_value ?? f.value); } return Array.from(new Set(out.filter(Boolean))); })() }}
